build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:hook && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build:hook:release && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' data: blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' http://localhost:5173; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' data: blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: http://asset.localhost http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'

bundle.copyright: Copyright 2026 Cause Connect Pte Ltd. MIT licensed.
bundle.shortDescription: Local-first, memory-light IDE for coding agents
bundle.longDescription: Canopy is a local-first, memory-light IDE built around coding agents and git worktrees. Terminal-first, offline-capable, no Electron.
